headline: Has The Dell Technologies (DELL) Rally Left Its Valuation Story Behind?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Dell Technologies stock still offers value at current levels, this article walks through what the numbers actually say about the price you see on screen. Over recent periods, the stock has recorded returns of 6.4% over 7 days, 30.2% over 30 days, 19.7% year to date, 61.6% over 1 year and 314.6% over 3 years. This naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already reflected in the US$153.01 share price. Recent headlines have focused on Dell...

headline: Nvidia's $1T Guidance Leaves Stock Flat, But These 4 Plays Could Explode
summary: At the GTC 2026 conference, Nvidia laid out a bold vision: Its flagship AI accelerators will help it generate $1 trillion in revenue from 2025 through 2027. That's a massive number for a product buried deep inside massive data centers, invisible to the average person.
